value_moments.persona_pain_quote: heard about Helping Hands from a friend, doesn't have a Salesforce login, just wants to help out at a food drive Saturday
value_moments.persona_outcome: Sarah opens the public site on her phone and sees Saturday's food drive at the top of the list — no signup, no friction

wow_moment.description: Public page renders with live shift data — no login screen, no Salesforce branding, just a clean shift list
wow_moment.why_audience_leans_forward: Audience expects a Salesforce login wall. They see a real public page that looks like the NGO's own site, with live data behind it.
wow_moment.presenter_cue: Pause on the public URL. Note: no auth.

anti_demo: Do not show how the guest user profile was configured
Do not show the Sharing Set

value_moments.persona_pain_quote: doesn't have a Salesforce login, just wants to help out
value_moments.persona_outcome: Sarah clicks 'Sign me up,' enters her email, and is done. Person Account created behind the scenes; she sees a confirmation.

wow_moment.description: Confirmation screen appears in <2s with a personalized message — and Maya's coordinator view, side-by-side, shows the new volunteer flag light up in real time
wow_moment.why_audience_leans_forward: The audience sees both ends of the transaction at once: Sarah's perspective and Maya's. The flag appears as Sarah's confirmation does.
wow_moment.presenter_cue: Watch Maya's screen on the right.

anti_demo: Do not show the Person Account creation Apex
Do not show the trigger handler
Do not show duplicate matching rules

value_moments.persona_pain_quote: spends ~3 hours every Monday reconciling shift signups across email + spreadsheet + Salesforce
value_moments.persona_outcome: Maya opens her dashboard Monday at 8am. New volunteers are flagged. She has her morning back to call the three first-timers personally.

wow_moment.description: Dashboard list view with red flags next to first-time volunteers, click-to-call action visible, all in one screen
wow_moment.why_audience_leans_forward: Audience realizes Maya's 3 hours of reconciliation is now the time before her first sip of coffee.
wow_moment.presenter_cue: Pause on the flags. Mention the 3 hours.

anti_demo: Do not show the report builder
Do not show how the flag was computed
Do not show the dashboard config

value_moments.persona_pain_quote: wants a dashboard at the end showing shifts filled this week, new volunteers this week, retention rate
value_moments.persona_outcome: Tom checks the dashboard during the all-hands and has a one-glance retention story for the board

wow_moment.description: Retention metric updates live as Sarah completes her first shift in the demo — going from 'new' to '1-shift volunteer' before the audience's eyes
wow_moment.why_audience_leans_forward: The metric that boards care about most — retention — is shown changing because of an action that just happened in the demo.
wow_moment.presenter_cue: Watch the retention number when I refresh.

anti_demo: Do not show CRM Analytics setup
Do not show data source configuration
